title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXXXII. Relics.
content:
I can weave diaper thick, thick, thick,
        And I can weave diaper thin,
        I can weave diaper out of doors
        And I can weave diaper in.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DCXXXII. Relics." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
